_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

tests.assertion: schools and school_users collections exist with required fields.
Valid school registration creates school and participation with registered/submitted statuses.
Duplicate active school registration is blocked or routed to review.
Only operations/admin roles can approve school.
Approval creates no duplicate school_user mappings on retry.
School coordinator cannot access another school by changing school_id.
Public role cannot read schools, school_users or participations.
Two-school test proves each coordinator sees only own school dashboard.
Approval, blocking and deactivation create audit events.
Every future school module bug fix adds a regression test.

acceptance_criteria: School registration works with valid data.
Coordinator can log in and see own dashboard.
No public or cross-school data leakage.
